{{Quote|Down, Fraal! Best behavior, rot you!|Nevo|<ref name="Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1">[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Fraal''' was a doglike [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] companion of [[Nevo]] and traveled with him in search of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] after their executions were commuted by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Fraal specifically was like the [[Bloodhound/Legends|Bloodhound]] and could sniff Fett out (on foot). He and the rest of Nevo's gang were killed in the search; Fraal himself was killed by one of Fett's heat-seeking wrist-rockets on [[Maryx Minor/Legends|Maryx Minor]].

{{Char-stub}}
